kanban_tasks.title: Audit build pipeline
kanban_tasks.body: Run npm run build. Document all errors, warnings, deprecations. Fix critical build errors. Report findings with file paths and line numbers.

kanban_tasks.title: Check env vars and API keys
kanban_tasks.body: Verify .env.local has all required vars for: Sanity (projectId, dataset, apiVersion), Prisma (DATABASE_URL), Supabase (url, anonKey), Stripe, Gemini API key. List missing vars.

kanban_tasks.title: Review Sanity CMS config and schema
kanban_tasks.body: Review sanity.config.ts, all schema files in sanity/, verify studio route at /studio, check GROQ queries, validate content pipeline end-to-end.

kanban_tasks.title: Review Prisma schema and DB connection
kanban_tasks.body: Review prisma/schema.prisma, check migrations, verify Supabase connection, run npx prisma validate.

kanban_tasks.title: Audit component structure and route map
kanban_tasks.body: Map all Next.js routes in src/app/, list components, identify missing pages, check Spline 3D and GSAP integrations, document site architecture.

kanban_tasks.title: Synthesize audit findings and create action plan
kanban_tasks.body: Read all Phase 1 audit outputs. Compile findings into a prioritized action plan: critical (blocks build), high (broken features), medium (missing config), low (improvements).
